stream_required: B.Tech / M.Tech (ME) B.Tech / M.Tech (ECE, EE) B.Tech / M.Tech (CSE)
eligibility: A minimum 7 CGPA throughout with no active backlogs
date_of_joining: January 2026 (Leaves will be provided for final exams)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months of Internship : Mechanical Design Engineer Intern : INR 30,000 per month Control Systems Engineer Intern : INR 30,000 per month Full Stack Engineer Intern : INR 45,000 per month Salary after 6 months of Internship (If PPO given) : Mechanical Design Engineer (PPO) : INR 8-10 LPA Control Systems Engineer (PPO) : INR 8-10 LPA Full Stack Developer (PPO) : INR 15-25 LPA

selection_process_steps: 4-5 virtual interview rounds conducted via Google Meet
